name: Shanghai Baosteel Packaging Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Baosteel Packaging Co., Ltd. engages in can-making, iron printing, and EOE-making businesses. It provides steel cans for Coca Cola; and UV metal color coating and printing line services for food and beverage industries. The company is based in Shanghai, China. Shanghai Baosteel Packaging Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Baosteel Metal Co., Ltd.
